artStyle: Modern anime illustration with sharp detailed linework, vibrant saturated colors, and dramatic shading. High-detail character rendering with dynamic poses. Cel-shaded with hard shadow edges. Detailed hair, clothing folds, and accessories. Contemporary action anime key visual aesthetic.
lighting: High-contrast dramatic lighting with saturated color gels. Neon glows and lens flare accents. Strong backlighting creating character silhouettes. Dynamic light sources, energy effects, and atmospheric particles.
compositionRules: Dynamic diagonal compositions with strong perspective lines. Characters in dramatic poses filling the frame. Speed lines and impact frames for emphasis. Close-up reaction shots with detailed eyes. Action-oriented framing even for static subjects.
culturalMarkers: Context-appropriate settings rendered in anime style. Modern and historical environments with anime-level environmental detail. Topic-relevant props and settings with stylistic flair.
antiArtifactGuidance: Sharp clean linework with consistent weight. Cel-shaded coloring with crisp shadow boundaries. Detailed expressive eyes with highlight reflections. Hair rendered as flowing distinct strands. Clean fabric folds following body form. No muddy colors or blurred edges.
